programme.title: Team - Round 2 - Longines Global Champions Tour - Rome, ITA
programme.desc: The decisive GCL Team Round 2. Reverse-order start from Round 1, with every rail and second counting toward the combined team total. Strategic rider swaps and cool heads over a technical track shape the podium and precious championship points in a high-stakes Roman finish.

programme.title: CSI5 - Longines Global Champions Tour - Rome, ITA
programme.desc: Top combinations tackle elite CSI5* classes at the Foro Italico. A technical track, tight time allowed and related lines test precision and power, with the fastest clears advancing to a jump-off. Expect fine margins, inside turns and bold strides as riders chase ranking points and momentum for the Grand Prix.

programme.title: Grand Prix of Rome - Longines Global Champions Tour - Rome, ITA
programme.desc: The 1.60m LGCT Grand Prix: one round plus jump-off for big championship points and a golden ticket to the Prague Playoffs Super Grand Prix. Huge oxers, delicate verticals and a demanding time allowed reward brave riding and perfect stride control in a high-stakes Roman finale.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Mexico City Jumping - GCL R1 Competition Team
Longines Global Champions Tour - Mexico City Jumping - GCL R2 – Competition Team

programme.desc: The Longines Global Champions Tour Miami Beach 2026 brings elite show jumping to a spectacular seaside setting, with the world’s top riders and horses competing across multiple classes. The highlight is the Grand Prix, where precision, speed and technique are key. Set against the iconic Miami skyline, the event combines top-level sport with a unique atmosphere on one of the Tour’s most distinctive stages.

programme.title: EN EPL Preview 2025/26 | E28
programme.desc: A tightly packed look-ahead to the forthcoming matchround with a mix of player interviews and special features.

programme.title: Brentford vs Fulham - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Brentford lost this exact fixture 3-2 last season, but haven’t lost consecutive home league games against Fulham since April 1998. Fulham have won each of their last three league games against Brentford, more than they had in their first 14 21st century meetings with the Bees.

programme.title: Leeds United vs Wolverhampton Wanderers - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Leeds have won their last four Premier League games against Wolves – only against Sunderland, Tottenham Hotspur and West Ham have they won more consecutively in the competition. Wolves have only lost one of their last five away league games against Leeds, though it was on their last visit in August 2022.

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Brighton & Hove Albion - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Tottenham are winless in their last three Premier League games against Brighton, having previously never gone more than once without a win against the Seagulls in the top-flight. Brighton have won two of their last four away league games against Spurs, including a 4-1 victory last season. They’d only won one of their first nine visits between 1977 and 2020.

programme.title: Chelsea vs Manchester United - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Chelsea have lost just one of their last 12 Premier League home games against Man Utd, and are looking to win three in a row against them at Stamford Bridge for the first time since April 2006. Following their 2-1 win in September, Manchester United are looking to complete the Premier League double over Chelsea for just the second time after the 2019-20 campaign.

programme.title: Liverpool vs Paris Saint-Germain - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Champions League is live and exclusive only on beIN. Paris Saint-Germain are the defending champions. The 2025/26 UEFA Champions League will be the second to be played under the new 36-team league phase. The final will be played on 30 May 2026 at Puskás Aréna in Budapest, Hungary.

programme.title: Chelsea vs Manchester United - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33

programme.title: EN EPL The Big Interview 2025/26 | E36 - Antoine Semenyo
programme.desc: Extended sit-downs and more informal 'out and about' interviews with the Premier League's biggest names.

programme.title: Everton vs Liverpool - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Everton have won just one of their last 14 Premier League home games against Liverpool, though 10 of those games have finished level. Liverpool have won their last two Premier League games against Everton, though both have come at Anfield. They last won three consecutive league Merseyside derbies between April 2016 and April 2017.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Arsenal - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Manchester City are unbeaten in their last 10 Premier League home games against Arsenal since a 2-0 loss in January 2015 under Manuel Pellegrini. Arsenal are unbeaten in their last five Premier League games against Man City, having lost 12 in a row against them before this.

programme.title: PSG vs Lyon - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 30
programme.desc: Lyon are the side Paris SG have faced most often under Luis Enrique among those against whom they have a 100% winning record in all competitions. None of the last 10 Ligue 1 games between Paris SG and Lyon at the Parc des Princes have ended in a draw, with PSG winning eight times and OL twice. This could be the PSG's 600th home victory in the top-flight.

programme.title: Passion Sous Pression - Magazine - Magazine Football 2023-2024
programme.desc: Sport, Football. Ils sont souvent critiques, mais leur nombre reste eleve en France. Ces arbitres, qu'ils soient amateurs ou internationaux, sont avant tout motives par leur passion pour le jeu et le sport.

programme.title: Atlético Madrid vs Barcelonne - Champions League - QR - Football 2025-2026
programme.desc: Sport, Football. Les passionnes de football du monde entier sont invites a suivre l'une des compétitions les plus prestigieuses: la Ligue des champions. Avec les plus grands clubs européens en quête du titre ultime, le spectacle est garanti du debut a la fin

programme.title: Doc Presidents Proprietaires La Fin D Une Ere - Football 2024
programme.desc: Sport, Football. Un regard dans les coulisses du quotidien des proprietaires de clubs du championnat de France, entre passion du jeu, enjeux financiers et incertitudes qui influencent leurs choix.

programme.title: Terrains D'espoirs - Football - Documentaire
programme.desc: Sport, Debate, Football. L'emission suit de jeunes footballeurs camerounais, entre terrains en terre battue et tournois de detection, et revele leurs reves, leurs sacrifices et leur quete du football local a l'international.

programme.title: Lille vs Nice - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 30

programme.desc: The AFC Champions League Elite is contested by Asia's top-division football clubs. programme.desc: What are the most amazing facts for the Group L for the next World Cup 2026

programme.title: Bayern München vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Champions League is live and exclusive only on beIN. Paris Saint-Germain are the defending champions. The 2025/26 UEFA Champions League will be the second to be played under the new 36-team league phase. The final will be played on 30 May 2026 at Puskás Aréna in Budapest, Hungary.

programme.title: Brentford vs Fulham - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Brentford lost this exact fixture 3-2 last season, but haven’t lost consecutive home league games against Fulham since April 1998. Fulham have won each of their last three league games against Brentford, more than they had in their first 14 21st century meetings with the Bees.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs a.f.c. Bournemouth - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Newcastle are winless in their last seven Premier League games against Bournemouth, with five of those finishing level. Bournemouth have won three of their seven Premier League away games against Newcastle, only winning more on the road at Wolves in the competition.

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Brighton & Hove Albion - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Tottenham are winless in their last three Premier League games against Brighton, having previously never gone more than once without a win against the Seagulls in the top-flight. Brighton have won two of their last four away league games against Spurs, including a 4-1 victory last season. They’d only won one of their first nine visits between 1977 and 2020.

programme.title: Chelsea vs Manchester United - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Chelsea have lost just one of their last 12 Premier League home games against Man Utd, and are looking to win three in a row against them at Stamford Bridge for the first time since April 2006. Following their 2-1 win in September, Manchester United are looking to complete the Premier League double over Chelsea for just the second time after the 2019-20 campaign.

programme.title: Bayern München vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: Bayern Munich’s victory in the first leg ended a nine-game winless run for them against Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League. Only once before have they won both legs of a knockout stage tie against them in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, doing so in the 2000-01 semi-finals. Since the start of the 2013-14 season, Real Madrid have the joint-most away wins against Bayern Munich across all competitions, despite only playing there four times in this period.

programme.title: MA Super Ligue 1
programme.desc: This week, SoAnne is at Paris FC. The football challenge will see six players from the club face off, refereed by Léon, a kid who isn't afraid to make his own rules. The interview will be conducted by 12-year-old Evan, for whom Thilo Kehrer of AS Monaco will hold no secrets. For the VIP Pass, Yann Gboho, in Toulouse, will prank little Iliana. The football story will tell you all about the Mbappé brothers.

programme.title: Zamalek SC (EGY) vs CR Belouizdad (ALG) - CAF Confederation Cup 2025/26 - SF - 2nd LEG
programme.desc: The CAF Confederation Cup is the second-tier competition of African club football, ranking below the CAF Champions League. Both competitions are live and exclusive only on beIN. Current champions re RS Berkane from Morocco.

programme.title: Chelsea vs Manchester United - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: All 380 matches from the English Premier league are live and exclusive only on beIN. All matches are available live with a choice of Arabic or English commentary. programme.title: Everton vs Liverpool - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Everton have won just one of their last 14 Premier League home games against Liverpool, though 10 of those games have finished level. Liverpool have won their last two Premier League games against Everton, though both have come at Anfield. They last won three consecutive league Merseyside derbies between April 2016 and April 2017.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Arsenal - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Manchester City are unbeaten in their last 10 Premier League home games against Arsenal since a 2-0 loss in January 2015 under Manuel Pellegrini. Arsenal are unbeaten in their last five Premier League games against Man City, having lost 12 in a row against them before this.

programme.title: PSG vs Lyon - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 30
programme.desc: Lyon are the side Paris SG have faced most often under Luis Enrique among those against whom they have a 100% winning record in all competitions. None of the last 10 Ligue 1 games between Paris SG and Lyon at the Parc des Princes have ended in a draw, with PSG winning eight times and OL twice. This could be the PSG's 600th home victory in the top-flight.

programme.title: Liverpool vs. Fulham - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Liverpool are winless in their last three Premier League games against Fulham. Only once have they had a longer run without a league win against the Cottagers. Fulham have won just two of their 32 away league games against Liverpool, winning 1-0 in both May 2012 and March 2021.

programme.title: Chelsea vs. Manchester City - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Chelsea are winless in their last nine Premier League games against Man City since a 2-1 away win in May 2021. Manchester City have won four of their last five away Premier League games against Chelsea, as many as they had in their previous 26 league visits to Stamford Bridge.

programme.title: Arsenal vs. A.F.C. Bournemouth - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Having won each of their first eight home games against Bournemouth in all competitions, Arsenal lost this exact league fixture 2-1 last season. Bournemouth have won two of their last three league games against Arsenal, more than they had in their previous 14.

programme.title: Manchester United vs. Leeds United - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Manchester United are unbeaten in their last 18 home league games against Leeds since a 1-0 loss in February 1981 under Dave Sexton. Following their 1-1 draw at Elland Road in January, Leeds are looking to avoid losing both league meetings with Manchester United in a season for the first time since 1994-95.

programme.desc: Chelsea have lost just one of their last 12 Premier League home games against Man Utd, and are looking to win three in a row against them at Stamford Bridge for the first time since April 2006. Lorient are currently on a 13-game winless run against Olympique de Marseille, their longest current drought against a top-flight side. Lorient have won just 12% of their home games against Olympique de Marseille in Ligue 1, their lowest win rate against a team they have hosted more than ten times in the top-flight.

programme.title: Angers vs Havre AC - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 30
programme.desc: Angers have gone 10 consecutive Ligue 1 matches without scoring more than one goal against Le Havre, only managing to score more than once in the first of 11 meetings between the two sides in the division, on 1 October 1959. Angers have not lost any of their five home Ligue 1 matches against Le Havre, keeping three clean sheets in these encounters.

programme.title: Ligue 1 Show - 2025/2026 - EP 30
programme.desc: All the greatest moments and action in Ligue 1 including incredible stories and interviews featuring ligue 1 stars.

programme.title: Bayern München vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
programme.desc: Bayern Munich’s victory in the first leg ended a nine-game winless run for them against Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League. Only once before have they won both legs of a knockout stage tie against them in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, doing so in the 2000-01 semi-finals. Since the start of the 2013-14 season, Real Madrid have the joint-most away wins against Bayern Munich across all competitions, despite only playing there four times in this period.

programme.title: Lens vs Toulouse - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 30
programme.desc: Lens have won seven of their last nine Ligue 1 matches against Toulouse, after failing to win any of their previous six. Lens have lost three of their last six home Ligue 1 matches against Toulouse, as many as they had in their previous 26 such games.

programme.title: Ligue 1: Iconic Players Best of Blanc , Ibrahimovic and Niang in Ligue 1
programme.desc: Ligue 1 Legends, program talks about the main achievements and numbers of three legends played in French league. Laurent Blanc , Zlatan Ibrahimovic and Mamadou Niang.

programme.title: Monaco vs Auxerre - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 30
programme.desc: Monaco have won each of their last five Ligue 1 encounters with Auxerre, their best run against this opponent. Only against Metz are AS Monaco FC on a better run among current top-flight teams. The last two Ligue 1 matches between Monaco and Auxerre at Stade Louis-II have produced 11 goals, as many as in the previous seven encounters between the two sides at Monaco.

programme.title: Metz vs Paris FC - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 30
programme.desc: Metz have won 68% of their matches against Paris FC in all competitions, their highest ratio against any opponent they have faced at least 15 times. There has never been a draw in seven Ligue 1 meetings between the two teams, with these encounters producing an average of four goals per game. Metz have scored in each of their last 17 matches against Paris FC in all competitions and have not failed to find the net against them since May 1973 in Ligue 1.

The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

programme.title: NBA Action 2025/2026
programme.desc: NBA ACTION keeps pace with the competition on the court while offering viewers an inside look at teams and players from around the League, including several popular weekly segments

programme.title: Aix vs Saint-Raphaël - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: MA Super Ligue 1
programme.desc: This week, SoAnne is at Paris FC. The football challenge will see six players from the club face off, refereed by Léon, a kid who isn't afraid to make his own rules. The interview will be conducted by 12-year-old Evan, for whom Thilo Kehrer of AS Monaco will hold no secrets. For the VIP Pass, Yann Gboho, in Toulouse, will prank little Iliana. The football story will tell you all about the Mbappé brothers.

programme.title: MA Super Ligue 1
programme.desc: This week, SoAnne is at Paris FC. The football challenge will see six players from the club face off, refereed by Léon, a kid who isn't afraid to make his own rules. The interview will be conducted by 12-year-old Evan, for whom Thilo Kehrer of AS Monaco will hold no secrets. For the VIP Pass, Yann Gboho, in Toulouse, will prank little Iliana. The football story will tell you all about the Mbappé brothers.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: Flavio Cobolli vs Alexander Zverev - ATP 500 BMW Open By Bitpanda - Munich 2026
programme.desc: Staged in Munich from 13–19 April at MTTC Iphitos, the ATP 500 clay-court tournament is one of Germany’s oldest events. Featuring a 32-player draw, it offers approximately €595,000 in prize money, with leading players competing for ranking points during the early European clay season.
